title: ageratina pendula
intro: Ageratina pendula, also known as Mexican Mint or White Cloud, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils and flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Ageratina pendula offers various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
